description: Email delivery and analytics service for sending transactional emails, tracking engagement metrics, validating addresses, and retrieving delivery statistics through the Mailgun API.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a transactional email with optional HTML content, template rendering, and engagement tracking capabilities.

to_email.description: The recipient's email address where the message will be delivered.

subject.description: The subject line that appears in the recipient's inbox.

text.description: Plain text version of the email body for clients that don't support HTML.

from_email.description: The sender's email address. If not provided, uses the domain's default sender address.

html.description: HTML-formatted version of the email body for rich content display.

template.description: Name of a pre-configured Mailgun template to use for email rendering.

tracking_clicks.description: Enable tracking of link clicks within the email content (default: true).

tracking_opens.description: Enable tracking of email opens via invisible pixel (default: true).

id.description: Unique message identifier assigned by Mailgun for tracking and reference.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the send operation result.

status.description: Current delivery status of the email: 'queued' (accepted for delivery) or 'sent' (transmitted to recipient server).

tools.name: send_mime_email
tools.description: Send a pre-formatted MIME message for advanced use cases requiring full control over email structure and headers.

to_email.description: The recipient's email address where the message will be delivered.

mime_message.description: Complete MIME-encoded email message including headers, body, and attachments.

from_email.description: The sender's email address. If not provided, uses the domain's default sender address.

id.description: Unique message identifier assigned by Mailgun for tracking and reference.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the send operation result.

tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Retrieve detailed event logs for email lifecycle tracking including delivery, opens, clicks, bounces, and complaints.

domain.description: The Mailgun sending domain to query events for.

event_types.description: Filter results by specific event types: 'accepted', 'delivered', 'failed', 'opened', 'clicked', 'unsubscribed', 'complained', or 'stored'.

begin_time.description: Start of the time range to query, formatted as RFC 2822 timestamp (e.g., 'Mon, 01 Jan 2026 00:00:00 GMT').

end_time.description: End of the time range to query, formatted as RFC 2822 timestamp (e.g., 'Mon, 01 Jan 2026 23:59:59 GMT').

limit.description: Maximum number of events to return in a single response (default: 100, maximum: 300).

event.description: Type of email event that occurred (e.g., 'delivered', 'opened', 'clicked', 'bounced').

id.description: Unique identifier for this specific event occurrence.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp indicating when the event occurred.

recipient.description: Email address of the recipient associated with this event.

domain.description: The Mailgun sending domain that originated the message.

message.description: Message headers and metadata associated with the event.

items.description: Array of email events matching the query criteria.

next.description: URL to retrieve the next page of results if more events are available.

previous.description: URL to retrieve the previous page of results.

paging.description: Pagination controls for navigating through large result sets.

tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: Verify email address validity, syntax correctness, and mailbox existence using Mailgun's validation service.

email.description: The email address to validate for syntax, domain, and mailbox verification.

address.description: The normalized email address that was validated.

is_valid.description: Overall validation result indicating whether the email address is valid and deliverable.

mailbox_verification.description: Mailbox existence check result: 'true' (exists), 'false' (doesn't exist), 'unknown' (cannot verify), or 'null' (not checked).

local_part.description: The username portion before the @ symbol.

domain.description: The domain portion after the @ symbol.

display_name.description: Display name if the address was provided in 'Name <email>' format.

parts.description: Parsed components of the email address.

did_you_mean.description: Suggested correction if a common typo or misspelling was detected in the email address.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Retrieve aggregated email delivery and engagement statistics for a sending domain.

domain.description: The Mailgun sending domain to retrieve statistics for.

event_types.description: Filter statistics by specific event types: 'accepted', 'delivered', 'failed', 'opened', 'clicked', 'complained', or 'unsubscribed'.

outgoing.description: Number of outgoing messages accepted for delivery.

accepted.description: Count of messages accepted by Mailgun.

smtp.description: Number of messages successfully delivered via SMTP.

http.description: Number of messages successfully delivered via HTTP.

delivered.description: Count of messages successfully delivered to recipients.

temporary.description: Number of temporary delivery failures (will be retried).

permanent.description: Number of permanent delivery failures (will not be retried).

opened.description: Number of emails opened by recipients (requires open tracking enabled).

clicked.description: Number of link clicks within emails (requires click tracking enabled).

complained.description: Number of spam complaints reported by recipients.

unsubscribed.description: Number of recipients who unsubscribed from the mailing list.

stats.description: Time-series statistics broken down by time period.

total_stats.description: Aggregated totals across all time periods in the query range.
